name: careplan-specialcare-cloudflare

scripts.dev: wrangler pages dev public --binding APP_ENV=local --binding TEAM_DOMAIN=https://local.invalid --binding POLICY_AUD=local-development --binding ALLOW_LOCAL_DEV=true --binding LOCAL_DEV_EMAIL=developer@local.invalid --binding DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY_ID=local-primary
scripts.qa: npm run check && npm run test:e2e && npm run build:functions

description: Mobile-first private care planning PWA for Cloudflare Pages, D1, R2 and Access.
